title: Kathie's Kitchen
subtitle: E-Commerce Platform
summary: Custom e-commerce and online ordering platform built for an international food retail client, with administrative tools for managing products and customer orders.
overview: Kathie's Kitchen is a custom e-commerce platform developed for an international client. It provides customers with a responsive online product browsing and ordering experience while giving the business custom administrative tools for managing products and orders.
problem: The business needed a dedicated online ordering platform that could present its products clearly, collect customer orders, and reduce the manual work involved in managing order information.
role: Full Stack Web Developer responsible for the customer-facing application, Django REST APIs, order workflow, administrative tools, and email-based order communication.
solution: Built a Nuxt.js storefront connected to Django REST Framework APIs and a PostgreSQL-backed order system. The platform supports product browsing, cart and order submission workflows, administrative order management, and transactional email communication.
features: Responsive product catalogue and online ordering experience
Cart and customer order submission workflow
Custom administrative tools for managing products and orders
Transactional email notifications for order communication
RESTful API architecture connecting the Nuxt.js frontend and Django backend

technicalDecisions.reason: Used to build a responsive, component-based storefront and ordering experience.
Used to model products, orders, and order items and expose the data through structured REST endpoints.
Used HTML email templates and backend email handling to support order notifications and customer communication.

challenges: Connecting the customer ordering workflow, backend order records, administrative management, and reliable HTML email delivery while keeping the ordering experience simple for customers.
outcomes: Delivered a production-ready online ordering platform that gave customers a dedicated digital ordering experience and provided the business with custom tools for managing products and customer orders.
